title: Stitch Pack [x32]
description: The Stitch Pack is a PVP resource pack
body:
![df](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/12c498fe196b0ca2df93a83eb2b8da1af2d092b9.png)

## Stitch PvP Pack 
Dive into the world of **Stitch** with this unique PvP resource pack! Inspired by the beloved character, this pack brings a fun and colorful touch to your battles.  

- **Thematic textures**: Styled swords, blue-tinted armor, and tools inspired by Stitch.  
- **Vibrant colors**: Dominantly blue and purple to reflect the character's energy.  
- **Optimized for PvP**: Lightweight textures for maximum smoothness.  
- **Custom effects**: Tailored particles and revamped interface for full immersion.  

Perfect for **Stitch** fans and PvP enthusiasts! 🌟
